title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Itinerary stops collection supports create, edit, and delete with list rows and derived counts updating from shared application state
At least two distinct views or interaction modes are switchable without full page navigation
Domain state beyond CRUD is implemented (filters, status/priority/mode, or equivalent) and recomputes visible results from the shared collection
Renders visible validation feedback when create is submitted with empty required fields, and the collection count does not increase
Itinerary stops list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Qwik stores holds stops, day selection, mode, and place detail — shared across components
Implemented with Qwik, Qwik stores, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist stops or day selection
Manages the stops collection only in component-local signals only rather than Qwik stores
Three-pane planner composition (sidebar / plan / map) remains dense and trip-specific
Empty plan list state is visually present when no stops remain
Collapses into a static brochure itinerary with no interactive stops collection
Required hover animations are present; list/map and detail tab switches behave as specified
Plan/Map mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover feedback on place rows or chrome so the planner feels static on pointer hover
